title: planning: break backend epics into child implementation issues
description: Each of the 13 backend epics is currently a single monolithic issue. Before starting implementation on any backend, break it into child issues that can be assigned and worked independently (including by parallel subagents). Standard breakdown for each backend: (1) implement struct and constructor (parse URI, validate config, no I/O); (2) implement SecretStore::get; (3) implement SecretStore::put; (4) implement SecretStore::refresh; (5) implement SigningBackend (backends that support it: aws-kms, azure-kv, pkcs11, wolfhsm); (6) unit tests with independent test vectors; (7) integration tests (LocalStack / Docker / simulator as appropriate); (8) wire into secretx umbrella from_uri dispatch. Dependencies: each set of child issues should depend on the URI parsing utility issue and the secretx-core epic.
